entry.title: [SYD2][Infrastructure ] - Room S2-5X-02 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 29, 21:00 UTC  -  Jul 30, 07:00 UTC

May 19, 15:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 29/07/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 30/07/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, Some devices in the room S2-5X-02 will temporarily lose power redundancy. Single-powered devices connected may experience a brief power interruption while they are migrated to other power source.

Public network will be unavailable for approximately 30–45 minutes for the racks specified below :
S2-5X-02-05A
S2-5X-02-05B
S2-5X-02-08B
S2-5X-02-09B

IPMI (Intelligent Platform Management Interface) will be unavailable during the maintenance window for the racks specified bellow :
S2-5X-02-06B
S2-5X-02-07A
S2-5X-02-07B
S2-5X-02-08B
S2-5X-02-09B
S2-5X-02-10A

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Infrastructure] - Room W16 Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 16, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 12, 15:29 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in the Room W16.

Start time : 16/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified racks listed below may experience temporary IPMI unavailability during the operation, for a period of five minutes per rack.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in Room W16.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [CCH01][Cooling System] - Rack CCH0101D02B Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 10, 06:00 - 16:00 UTC

Jun 1, 13:27 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in Rack CCH0101D02B.

Start time : 10/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [Global][Network Services] - OVHcloud Load Balancer maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jun 2, 16:42 UTC
Completed - The maintenance won't be completed in scheduled time. It has been postponed and will be rescheduled.
A new post will be created when the new schedule has been validated.

Jun 2, 12:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 29, 14:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Load Balancing offering.

Start time : 02/06/2026 12:00 UTC
End time : 02/06/2026 18:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers may experience brief connection resets lasting a few seconds during the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Load Balancing infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
